name: New Potatoes with Dill
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons I Can't Believe It's Not Butter - Light
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash potatoes and cut into 3/8 inch thick slices.
2. Arrange the potato slices in a single layer in a 12x7 baking dish.
3. Dot the potato slices with butter, sprinkle with dill and salt.
4. Cover the dish and bake at 425°F for 25 minutes, stirring after 15 minutes.
5. Serve 4 servings.
This recipe was originally on EAT-L mailing list. It was very good. Entered into MasterCook and tested for you by Reggie & Jeff Dwork (reggie@reggie.com).
